variables.name: color/background/secondary

variables.name: color/disabled/surface
variables.description: Disabled control fill — one muted neutral, any intent

variables.name: color/disabled/on-disabled
variables.description: Label / icon on a disabled fill — muted but clears 3:1

variables.name: color/field/surface
variables.description: Form field fill — a subtly inset surface for inputs (the value ink is text.primary; it tracks the page tier so text clears)

variables.name: color/field/border
variables.description: Form field resting border — a perceivable boundary, 3:1 (SC 1.4.11) — better than a sub-3:1 resting border

variables.name: color/field/placeholder
variables.description: Form field placeholder ink — a READABLE hint, 4.5:1 on the field fill (not a sub-AA placeholder)
